channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 16.5%.

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Every poll, on every issue, shows the folly of the Starmer-McSweeney “treat Reform voters as your lodestone and Tory voters like lepers” strategy.
item.description: Every poll, on every issue, shows the folly of the Starmer-McSweeney “treat Reform voters as your lodestone and Tory voters like lepers” strategy.

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Shame he didn’t go for some nonsense “the fiscal rules ate my homework” explanation for the full Starmer tribute:
item.description: Shame he didn’t go for some nonsense “the fiscal rules ate my homework” explanation for the full Starmer tribute:

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer’s premiership ‘falling apart’, opponents claim, after Healey resigns over defence funding – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer’s premiership ‘falling apart’, opponents claim, after Healey resigns over defence funding – UK politics live

item.title: Bloomberg: Now Starmer’s Rivals Can Turn Defense Into Attack - Bloomberg
item.description: Now Starmer’s Rivals Can Turn Defense Into Attack - Bloomberg

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Polite but deadly: John Healey skewers Keir Starmer as he heads for the door | John Crace
item.description: Polite but deadly: John Healey skewers Keir Starmer as he heads for the door | John Crace

item.title: The Guardian: John Healey resignation letter: what it said and what he meant - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer in fresh crisis as Healey quits government with scathing attack on PM’s plan to protect Britain
item.description: Starmer in fresh crisis as Healey quits government with scathing attack on PM’s plan to protect Britain

item.title: The Guardian: Andy Burnham rules out paying compensation to Waspi women - The Guardian
item.description: Andy Burnham rules out paying compensation to Waspi women - The Guardian

item.title: BBC Politics: Healey quits as defence secretary amid military spending row
item.description: Healey quits as defence secretary amid military spending row
